⚠ INTERLEAVED PINOUT
Even cells: pins 2-11 (row 1)
Odd cells: pins 14-22 (row 2)
⚠ L-018: Set ALL 18 cells for OV test
⚠ GAP-03: Single-cell OV rejected (300mV)
